title: Xtra Dense Roasted Irish Duck Leg Roast
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring roasted duck legs infused with oil, perfect for a crowd, this recipe is a low-fat friendly twist on traditional Irish cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together infuse oil, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Rub the mixture all over the duck legs, making sure to coat them evenly.
Place the duck legs in a large roasting pan and add the chopped carrots and potatoes.
Roast the duck legs and vegetables in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
Baste the duck legs with the pan juices and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the roasting pan from the oven and let the duck legs rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the roasted duck legs with the carrots and potatoes, spooning some of the pan juices over the top.
